name: Honey-Glazed Oven Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Completely cover the spareribs with water in a large pot or deep skillet. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Simmer for 4 minutes, then drain the liquid and reserve it if desired.
4. Season both sides of the spareribs with salt and pepper.
5. Place the spareribs on a rack in a roasting pan and cover loosely with foil.
6. Bake at 450°F for 15 minutes.
7. Combine the remaining ingredients; mix well.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 350°F. Brush the spareribs with the honey mixture.
9. Continue baking until fully cooked, about 1 hour longer, brushing every 15 minutes.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Per serving: Calories 941 Fat 66g Cholesterol 218 mg Sodium 217 mg Percent calories from fat 64%
Food Staff Dallas Morning News 4/2/96 Typos by Bobbie Beers
